evidence.observed: Job Search GET requests require the user's registered email and API key headers.
API data is limited to the registered consumer's approved use and may not be rented, leased, loaned, sold, traded, or made into derivative works.
The Search API documents row and page-size ceilings but no hourly request allowance.

review_result: Automation remains blocked until registration-specific approved use covers JobSentinel's normalized local records and the derivative-work boundary is resolved.

local_policy.operation: candidate authenticated GET job-search checks only
local_policy.basis: Candidate JobSentinel ceiling only; it does not authorize automation or resolve the approved-use boundary.
